title: Fix evaluation when variables are assigned in DPI exported functions

features.name: dpi_exported_function_writes_variable
features.description: Code should include a DPI exported function that writes to a module-level variable which is subsequently used in combinational logic

features.name: variable_written_in_dpi_export_used_downstream
features.description: Code should include a variable assigned within a DPI exported function that is used in downstream combinational logic evaluation
